<!-- Thanks for contributing! See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

**What does this change?**
A short description of the change and why.

**How did you verify it?**
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run smoke` run against my own store (if the client changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/api-capture.md` (if I touched/added an endpoint)

**Notes for reviewers**
Anything tricky, trade-offs, or follow-ups.
